2606.27696.title: Class-frequency Guided Noise Schedule for Diffusion Models
2606.27696.paper_summary: In this paper, we are the first to examine the correlations between class frequency and the multi-scale noise schedule within diffusion models. For score-based generative models, low-density regions often lead to inaccurately estimated scores, thereby compromising the generation quality. Although the multi-scale noise schedule can alleviate this issue during the diffusion process, low-frequency classes still face the challenge of large low-density regions, resulting in more inaccurate estimated scores than high-frequency classes. Furthermore, high-frequency classes tend to dominate the score space, causing a convergence of most data points towards generating samples from these classes. Consequently, samples generated within low-frequency classes exhibit suboptimal quality and limited diversity. To address this challenge, we propose the \textit{Class-frequency Guided (CFRG)} noise schedule, leveraging the insight that low-frequency classes should be endowed with larger-scale noises. To illustrate the effectiveness of our method, we conduct experiments on various tasks, including image generation, image classification, and text-to-image generation, using imbalanced datasets, \textit{i.e.}, CIFAR-100-LT, and ImageNet-LT. By employing the CFRG noise schedule, we achieve substantial improvements over baselines, manifesting the crucial role of frequency statistics in noise schedule design.
2606.27696.paper_summary_zh: 在本文中，我們首次檢視了類別頻率與擴散模型中的多尺度噪聲時間表之間的相關性。對於基於分數的生成模型，低密度區域往往導致分數的估計不準確，從而影響生成質量。雖然多尺度噪聲時間表可以在擴散過程中緩解這一問題，但低頻類別仍然面臨大規模低密度區域的挑戰，導致其估計的分數比高頻類別更不準確。此外，高頻類別往往主導分數空間，導致大多數數據點集中生成這些類別的樣本。因此，在低頻類別中生成的樣本表現出次優質量和有限的多樣性。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了\textit{Class-frequency Guided (CFRG)}噪聲時間表，利用低頻類別應該賦予更大尺度噪聲的見解。為了說明我們方法的有效性，我們在各種任務上進行了實驗，包括圖像生成、圖像分類和文本到圖像生成，使用不平衡數據集，即CIFAR-100-LT和ImageNet-LT。通過採用CFRG噪聲時間表，我們在基準上實現了顯著的改進，顯示了頻率統計在噪聲時間表設計中的關鍵作用。
2606.27696.author: Jiequan Cui et.al.
2606.27696.authors: Jiequan Cui, Beier Zhu, Qingshan Xu, Xiaojuan Qi, Bei Yu, Hanwang Zhang
